Uses of Interface
recoder.util.ProgressListener

Packages that use ProgressListener
Package
Description
recoder.io
The io package provides classes to import and export source and class files.
recoder.kit.transformation
This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.
recoder.util
This package provides basic data types and algorithms.

    Description

    DefaultSourceFileRepository.addProgressListener(ProgressListener l)
     
    void
    SourceFileRepository.addProgressListener(ProgressListener l)
    Adds a progress listener for SourceFileRepository.getAllCompilationUnitsFromPath(), SourceFileRepository.getCompilationUnitsFromFiles(String[])and SourceFileRepository.printAll(boolean).
    void
    DefaultSourceFileRepository.removeProgressListener(ProgressListener l)
     
    void
    SourceFileRepository.removeProgressListener(ProgressListener l)
    Removes the given progress listener.
